items.line_en: Hi, is this your first time here?

coach.say: Hi, is this your first time here?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi, / is this your first time here?

items.line_en: Yes.

coach.say: Yes.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes.

items.line_en: Okay, welcome.

coach.say: Okay, welcome.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / welcome.

items.line_en: I will need to record your details to begin.

coach.say: I will need to record your details to begin.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I will need to record your details to begin.

items.line_en: Perfect.

coach.say: Perfect.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Perfect.

items.line_en: May I please have your first and last name?

coach.say: May I please have your first and last name?
coach.hint: Chunk it: May I please have your first and / last name?

items.line_en: My name is Martha and my last name is Smith.

coach.say: My name is Martha and my last name is Smith.
coach.hint: Chunk it: My name is Martha and / my last name is Smith.

items.line_en: Date of birth and place of residence, please.

coach.say: Date of birth and place of residence, please.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Date of birth and place of residence, / please.

items.line_en: October 12, 1987.

coach.say: October 12, 1987.
coach.hint: Chunk it: October 12, / 1987.

items.line_en: I live in Manhattan.

coach.say: I live in Manhattan.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I live in Manhattan.

items.line_en: Perfect.

coach.say: Perfect.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Perfect.

items.line_en: Let me explain how it works.

coach.say: Let me explain how it works.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Let me explain how it works.

items.line_en: I will give you slippers, a bathrobe and a towel.

coach.say: I will give you slippers, a bathrobe and a towel.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I will give you slippers, / a bathrobe and a towel.

items.line_en: You can change in the dressing room at the end on the left.

coach.say: You can change in the dressing room at the end on the left.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You can change in the dressing room at the end on the left.

items.line_en: Remember it is mandatory to wear slippers in all rooms.

coach.say: Remember it is mandatory to wear slippers in all rooms.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Remember it is mandatory to wear slippers in all rooms.

items.line_en: Okay, I understand.

coach.say: Okay, I understand.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / I understand.

items.line_en: Do you have any questions?

coach.say: Do you have any questions?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you have any questions?

items.line_en: No, I don't.

coach.say: No, I don't.
coach.hint: Chunk it: No, / I don't.

items.line_en: Thank you for the information.

coach.say: Thank you for the information.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you for the information.

items.line_en: Okay, come with me and I will show you our services.

coach.say: Okay, come with me and I will show you our services.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay, / come with me and I will show you our services.
